## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Built the `DCPulse` scheme for an available iPhone Simulator
- [ ] Ran all unit and UI tests
- [ ] Tested relevant loading, empty, and error states
- [ ] Checked Dynamic Type, VoiceOver labels, and Light/Dark Mode when UI changed
- [ ] Added or updated fixture-backed tests for transport or adapter changes

## Safety

- [ ] No real home address, precise private location, credential, signing asset, or personal data is included
- [ ] No signing, team, certificate, provisioning, entitlement, capability, or bundle-ID setting changed
- [ ] No unrelated user-owned changes are included
- [ ] Documentation reflects any changed behavior or data-source assumption

## Visuals

Add privacy-safe screenshots or recordings for user-interface changes, when useful.
